decision_threshold.description: The classification threshold was selected based on business requirements.
decision_threshold.business_preference: Higher recall was preferred because failing to identify a churn-risk customer has higher impact.

limitations.description: The model depends on historical patterns and may degrade when customer behavior changes.
details: may degrade when customer behavior changes
limitations.recommendation: Predictions should be reviewed before action.

when_not_to_use: decisions require human understanding beyond prediction
